statement: In every magma, Equation 3399 (`x * y = z * (y * (x * w))`) implies Equation 3714 (`x * y = (x * x) * (y * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0171
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op y (op x w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op x x) (op y x))
